'''langate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenoglossically|xenoglossically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenoglossically|xenoglossically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| langate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:langate|langate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:langatesher|langatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langatesherĂ«m|langatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:langatero|langatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:langateshĂ«|langateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langateshĂ«m|langateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilangatero|gokilangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilangateshĂ«|gokilangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilangateshĂ«m|gokilangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golangankerom|golangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golangankeshĂ«|golangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golangankeshĂ«m|golangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golangankeya|golangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:langaterom|langaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langatemu|langatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:langateya|langateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilangaterom|gokilangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilangatemu|gokilangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilangateya|gokilangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:langangate|langangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:langangatesher|langangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langangatesherĂ«m|langangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:langangatero|langangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:langangateshĂ«|langangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langangateshĂ«m|langangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilangangatero|gokilangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilangangateshĂ«|gokilangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilangangateshĂ«m|gokilangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golangangankerom|golangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golangangankeshĂ«|golangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golangangankeshĂ«m|golangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golangangankeya|golangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:langangaterom|langangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:langangatemu|langangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:langangateya|langangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilangangaterom|gokilangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilangangatemu|gokilangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilangangateya|gokilangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠte|lĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠtesher|lĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠtero|lĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠtero|gokilĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠngĂŠnkerom|golĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠngĂŠnkeya|golĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠterom|lĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠtemu|lĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠngĂŠteya|lĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠterom|gokilĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠngĂŠteya|gokilĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafngafte|lafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafngaftesher|lafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafngaftesherĂ«m|lafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafngaftero|lafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafngafteshĂ«|lafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafngafteshĂ«m|lafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafngaftero|gokilafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafngafteshĂ«|gokilafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafngafteshĂ«m|gokilafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafngafnkerom|golafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafngafnkeshĂ«|golafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafngafnkeshĂ«m|golafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafngafnkeya|golafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafngafterom|lafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafngaftemu|lafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafngafteya|lafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafngafterom|gokilafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafngaftemu|gokilafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafngafteya|gokilafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
